text.tspan: Latest stable code in branch named master / main
Any development work must be done in a dedicated branch or fork
Project maintainers must have RW access to the work
All changes must appen only through Pull Request
PR from working branch targeting master / main
PR author cannot merge own PR
PR author is responsible to declare impact
Reviewers from project community with required skills , when possible
PR impact should be classified as Large or Lower
At least one reviewer from different institution or group
Approved PRs merged by a contributor in the merging group
PRs must be approved by reviewers
Branch is deleted once PR is merged or closed
No direct changes on master / main branch
